changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_policy_captures_metadata to k8s_audit_policy_metadata_captured for consistency
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to audit logging and admission controllers, which are key components for security monitoring and threat detection. The naming mostly follows conventions, but a minor change was made for consistency. The functions accurately map to Kubernetes security controls.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent use of past participle in function names for clarity
title: Requirement 11.4.5
step1_reasoning: The control 11.4.5 relates to enabling threat detection and security monitoring services in cloud environments. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to enabling audit logging to track and monitor API requests and using admission controllers for security enforcement. These mechanisms help in detecting and responding to potential security threats within the Kubernetes cluster.
